signal: Feed scoring subagent invented own 0-100 four-dimension framework instead of SKILL.md's three-dimension weighted system.
action: Added anti-hallucination guard to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.12.1.
evidence_150: 2026-03-18 articles ALL use correct three dimensions. 13/13 have proper scoreBreakdown format. Guard working.
superseded_by: Monolithic feed-collector split into feed-collect + feed-score. feed-score has dedicated SKILL.md with only scoring instructions, eliminating context overload that caused framework drift.

signal: Cron prompt vs SKILL.md contradiction pattern.
action: Added Cron-SKILL sync guardrail to cron-best-practices.md.
evidence_150: Cron prompt now says '14 sources all required'. SKILL.md v1.13.1 matches. No contradiction observed in 2026-03-18 runs.
superseded_by: New cron prompts built from scratch for split architecture (0ead0a6f + 802b31b9). Old contradictory prompt removed with disabled cron fa1c5a67.

signal: Feed collection duplicate file numbering across runs.
action: Added numbering continuation rule to SKILL.md v1.12.2.
evidence_150: 2026-03-18: 001-013 continuous across 3 runs (5+3+5). No numbering collisions. Fix working.
superseded_by: Numbering now handled by feed-score (Step 4 ls command) which runs independently. Architecture prevents cross-run collision.

signal: scoreBreakdown field missing despite v1.12.1 guard.
action: Added required-field completeness check to SKILL.md v1.12.2 Step 7.
evidence_150: 2026-03-18: 13/13 articles have scoreBreakdown in correct format '信息增量:N 内容质量:N 实用价值:N 减分:N'. Fix working.
superseded_by: feed-score SKILL.md v1.1.0 has explicit scoreBreakdown format requirement and '不要发明任何不在本文件中的评分维度' hard rule. Dedicated context = higher compliance.

signal: seen.json structural bug: collection agent writes new URLs at JSON top level instead of inside 'entries' sub-dict.
action: Fixed seen.json data. Added structural constraint to feed-collect SKILL.md Step 5.
evidence_151: feed-collect v1.0.0 Step 5 shows correct entries wrapper format. v1.0.1 adds arXiv URL normalization. First split-architecture runs show correct seen.json writes. Need 2 more cycles to confirm.

signal: arXiv URL normalization rule from ct_031 fix (feed-collector v1.13.1) was not carried over to new feed-collect v1.0.0 during architectural split.
action: Added URL normalization rules (arXiv abs/pdf unification, utm removal, anchor stripping) to feed-collect v1.0.1 Step 3.
